chapter_title.ar: باب عِدَّةِ الْمُخْتَلِعَةِ وَ الْمُبَارِئَةِ وَ نَفَقَتِهِمَا وَ سُكْنَاهُمَا
chapter_title.en: Chapter 64 – Waiting period of the women divorced by Al-Khul’a, and Al-Mubaraat, and their expenses, and their dwelling

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (1/241)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (1/241)

parts.text: أَحْمَدَ بْنِ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ أَبِي نَصْرٍ

text: عِدَّةُ الْمُخْتَلِعَةِ مِثْلُ عِدَّةِ الْمُطَلَّقَةِ وَ خُلْعُهَا طَلَاقُهَا .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Sahl Bin Ziyad, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad Bin Abu Nasr, from Abdul Kareem, from Abu Baseer,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullahasws having said: ‘A waiting period of the woman divorced by Al-Khul’a is similar to a waiting period of the divorced woman, and her Khul’a is her divorce’.
en.sarwar: 1. A number of our people have narrated from Sahl ibn Ziyad from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from ibn abu Nasr from ‘Abd al-Karim from ibn abu Nasr who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said that waiting period for al-Khul‘ is like the waiting period for divorced woman and al-Khul‘ is her divorce.’”
